title: Point Blank's Minigun Motor Recipe
description: Craftable Minigun Motor for Point Blank
body:
This adds [Point Blank](https://modrinth.com/mod/vics-point-blank)'s Minigun Motor Recipe.
You don't have to trade with an arms dealer for you to get it anymore, you can just craft it yourself.

The crafting recipe uses items from the main mod.

This is the crafting recipe:

![Alex's Point Blank's Minigun Motor Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59d7f4b4162086c055ec9165842f304e1ea4ee9c.png)
